Component.Update: (A:GENERAL ENG COMBUSTION:1, bool) (A:GENERAL ENG COMBUSTION:2, bool) || (O:CHECKED) ! and if{ 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_FRONT_WHEEL) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_LEFT_WHEEL) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_RIGHT_WHEEL) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_LEFT_AILERON) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_RIGHT_AILERON) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_LEFT_PROPELLER) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_RIGHT_PROPELLER) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_ELEVATOR) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_RUDDER) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_LEFT_PITOT_COVER) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_RIGHT_PITOT_COVER) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_LEFT_OIL_LEVEL) 1 (>L:WALKAROUND_RIGHT_OIL_LEVEL) 1 (>O:CHECKED) }
